policyname: Cliente vê help requests pendentes de aprovação
qual:
((status = 'pending_approval'::text) AND (EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM job_requests
  WHERE ((job_requests.id = help_requests.job_id) AND (job_requests.client_id = auth.uid())))))

with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM job_proposals
  WHERE ((job_proposals.id = help_requests.proposal_id) AND (job_proposals.worker_id = auth.uid()) AND (job_proposals.status = 'accepted'::text))))

policyname: Cliente adiciona fotos aos seus jobs
with_check:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM job_requests
  WHERE ((job_requests.id = job_photos.job_id) AND (job_requests.client_id = auth.uid()))))

policyname: Ver fotos de jobs proprios ou abertos
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM job_requests
  WHERE ((job_requests.id = job_photos.job_id) AND ((job_requests.client_id = auth.uid()) OR (job_requests.status = 'open'::text)))))

policyname: Client vê propostas dos seus jobs
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM job_requests
  WHERE ((job_requests.id = job_proposals.job_id) AND (job_requests.client_id = auth.uid()))))

policyname: Worker ve jobs onde tem proposta
Utilizador marca as suas notificações como lidas
Cliente ve perfil de worker com job confirmado
Worker ve perfil de cliente com job confirmado
qual:
(EXISTS ( SELECT 1
   FROM (job_proposals jp
     JOIN job_requests jr ON ((jr.id = jp.job_id)))
  WHERE ((jp.worker_id = auth.uid()) AND (jr.client_id = profiles.id) AND (jp.status = 'accepted'::text))))

policyname: Leitura pública de tipos de serviço
Cliente ve worker_profile com job confirmado
Qualquer autenticado vê serviços de workers
